rule_metadata.name: Mal_Win32_Chaos_Builder_Ransomware_2022
rule_metadata.author: BlackBerry Threat Research
rule_metadata.license: This Yara rule is provided under the Apache License 2.0 (https://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0) and open to any user or organization, as long as you use it under this license and ensure originator credit in any derivative to The BlackBerry Research & Intelligence Team

rules.rule_text:
rule Mal_Win32_Chaos_Builder_Ransomware_2022
{
	meta:
		description = "Detects Chaos Ransomware Builder"
		reference = "https://blogs.blackberry.com/en/2022/05/yashma-ransomware-tracing-the-chaos-family-tree"
		author = "BlackBerry Threat Research"
		date = "2022-05-10"
		license = "This Yara rule is provided under the Apache License 2.0 (https://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0) and open to any user or organization, as long as you use it under this license and ensure originator credit in any derivative to The BlackBerry Research & Intelligence Team"

	strings:
		$s0 = "1qw0ll8p9m8uezhqhyd" ascii wide
		$s1 = "Chaos Ransomware Builder" ascii wide
		$s2 = "payloadFutureName" ascii wide
		$s3 = "read_it.txt" ascii wide
		$s4 = "encryptedFileExtension" ascii wide
		$x0 = "1098576" ascii wide
		$x1 = "2197152" ascii wide

	condition:
		uint16( 0 ) == 0x5a4d and ( ( all of ( $s* ) ) and ( 1 of ( $x* ) ) )
}
